methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
description: Archived objective sets retained for historical traceability.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Increase cross-category marketplace liquidity
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the speed and quality with which local demand meets trusted supply across the marketplace.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Focuses teams on customer and marketplace outcomes rather than isolated feature delivery.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Buyer discovery and trust signals discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Highlights the main buyer-side conversion constraints.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Casual seller publish funnel and pricing guidance discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Highlights the main casual-seller supply constraints.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make local transactions safer and more repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the trust, identity, and transaction controls that let the marketplace support higher-value and higher-risk exchanges.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps trust work tied to concrete customer and marketplace outcomes.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Protected transactions and fraud controls discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Highlights categories where trust controls suppress fraud and improve conversion.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Local Buyer / Seeker outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve successful buyer transaction rate by strengthening buyer discovery, trust, and messaging responsiveness.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of buyer journeys that reach a trustworthy contact and successful transaction outcome.
Share of high-risk transactions completed without fraud, dispute, or safety incident.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Buyer activity converted into qualified marketplace liquidity and monetizable engagement.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline from Q1 buyer funnel reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase successful buyer transaction rate during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead buyer discovery and detail-page conversion work.

supportingTeams.intent: Provide trust signals and protected transaction support.
Improve search relevance and supply matching.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Outcome target with room for learning and iteration.

target1.label: 2026-Q3 target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Successful buyer transaction rate moves far enough to show clear momentum toward improve quarter over quarter, driven by increase successful buyer transaction rate during the quarter.

target2.label: 2026-year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Successful buyer transaction rate ends the horizon sustainably ahead of today's baseline, with improve quarter over quarter holding across the broader operating model.

keyResults.statement: Increase trust-safe transaction rate during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead identity, fraud, and protected transaction work.

supportingTeams.intent: Expose trust controls in buyer journeys.
Expose trust controls in seller workflows.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Outcome target with constrained scope to selected categories.

target1.label: 2026-Q3 target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Trust-safe transaction rate moves far enough to show clear momentum toward improve quarter over quarter, driven by increase trust-safe transaction rate during the quarter.

target2.label: 2026-year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Trust-safe transaction rate ends the horizon sustainably ahead of today's baseline, with improve quarter over quarter holding across the broader operating model.

linkedInitiatives.description: Improve cross-category local discovery by strengthening search relevance, saved alerts, and buyer trust signals across the buyer web and mobile experiences.
Strengthen identity, fraud controls, and optional protected transaction flows in higher-risk categories.

linkedReleases.description: Release of buyer discovery improvements covering search relevance, alerts, and detail-page trust signals across buyer web and mobile.
